proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0, after adjustment for demographics, histology, smoking, ECOG, albumin, weight loss, LDH, CRP, NLR, brain metastases, liver metastases, bone metastases, and pleural effusion.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months including stage_iv and core clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted stage IV coefficient: effect=-1.418 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without brain metastases, after the same clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months including has_brain_mets and core clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted brain-metastasis coefficient: effect=-0.917 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with ecog_ps centered and entered linearly.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ECOG coefficient: effect=-1.103 months per ECOG point, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with albumin_g_dl centered and entered linearly.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted albumin coefficient: effect=0.454 months per g/dL, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with weight_loss_pct_6mo centered and entered linearly.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted weight-loss coefficient: effect=-0.073 months per percentage point, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months`, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with ldh_u_l centered and scaled per 100 U/L.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted LDH coefficient: effect=-0.041 months per 100 U/L, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older `age_years` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with age_years centered and entered linearly.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted age coefficient: effect=0.169 months per year, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `sex_female` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `sex_female` equal to 0, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months including sex_female.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted female-sex coefficient: effect=-0.205 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `histology` equal to squamous have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `histology` equal to adenocarcinoma, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with histology_squamous dummy variable.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted squamous-histology coefficient: effect=-0.719 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `smoking_status` equal to current have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `smoking_status` equal to former, after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with current and never smoking dummies; former is reference.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted current-smoking coefficient: effect=-0.483 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After accounting for stage, brain metastases, ECOG, albumin, weight loss, and LDH, extracranial disease markers `liver_mets`, `bone_mets`, and `pleural_effusion` each still have negative independent associations with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months including liver_mets, bone_mets, and pleural_effusion.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted liver-metastasis coefficient: effect=-0.006 months, p=0.569.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months including liver_mets, bone_mets, and pleural_effusion.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted bone-metastasis coefficient: effect=-0.001 months, p=0.893.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months including liver_mets, bone_mets, and pleural_effusion.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted pleural-effusion coefficient: effect=0.005 months, p=0.617.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher inflammatory markers `crp_mg_l` and `nlr` are independently associated with lower `pfs_months`, after adjustment for stage, brain metastases, ECOG, albumin, weight loss, and LDH.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with crp_mg_l and nlr centered and entered linearly.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted CRP coefficient: effect=1.500e-4 months per mg/L, p=0.702.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months with crp_mg_l and nlr centered and entered linearly.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted NLR coefficient: effect=-9.408e-4 months per NLR unit, p=0.583.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0 after clinical adjustment, before explicitly modeling treatment interaction.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months adding kras_g12c to the clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted KRAS G12C main coefficient: effect=0.893 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1 than in patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c + clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Sotorasib by KRAS G12C interaction: effect=2.535 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0, `treatment_sotorasib` is not associated with higher `pfs_months`; any sotorasib benefit is restricted to the KRAS G12C subgroup.

analyses.code: Welch-style large-sample mean comparison of pfs_months by treatment_sotorasib among kras_g12c==0 patients.
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS G12C-negative patients, mean PFS was 3.329 months on sotorasib vs 3.334 months off sotorasib; difference=-0.005 months, p=0.799.

analyses.code: Welch-style large-sample mean comparison of pfs_months by treatment_sotorasib among kras_g12c==1 patients.
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS G12C-positive patients, mean PFS was 5.766 months on sotorasib vs 3.213 months off sotorasib; difference=2.552 months, p=<1e-250.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the `kras_g12c` subgroup, `stk11_mutation` attenuates the positive `treatment_sotorasib` association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted three-way interaction model with treatment_sotorasib, kras_g12c, stk11_mutation, all lower-order terms, and clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Sotorasib by KRAS G12C by STK11 interaction: effect=-0.173 months, p=4.862e-4.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` becomes more positive as `pdl1_tps` increases, measured per 0.10 increase in `pdl1_tps`.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * centered pdl1_tps per 0.10 + clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab by PD-L1 TPS interaction: effect=2.090e-5 months per 0.10 PD-L1 increment, p=0.995.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `tmb_high` equal to 1 than in patients with `tmb_high` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * tmb_high + clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab by TMB-high interaction: effect=-0.014 months, p=0.385.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is less positive in oncogene-driven subgroups, specifically patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 1 or `alk_fusion` equal to 1.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model with treatment_pembrolizumab interactions for egfr_mutation and alk_fusion.
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab by EGFR mutation interaction: effect=0.020 months, p=0.350.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model with treatment_pembrolizumab interactions for egfr_mutation and alk_fusion.
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab by ALK fusion interaction: effect=0.014 months, p=0.668.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_osimertinib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model pfs_months ~ treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation + clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Osimertinib by EGFR mutation interaction: effect=-0.017 months, p=0.471.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_olaparib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation + clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib by BRCA2 mutation interaction: effect=-0.004 months, p=0.926.

analyses.code: Same OLS adjusted interaction model, reporting the BRCA2 main coefficient among olaparib-untreated patients.
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2 mutation main coefficient: effect=-0.111 months, p=5.656e-6.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `alk_fusion` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `alk_fusion` equal to 0 after clinical adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model for pfs_months adding alk_fusion, met_exon14_skipping, ret_fusion, ros1_fusion, and her2_amplification to the clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ALK fusion coefficient: effect=-0.023 months, p=0.162.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is less positive in patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 1 than in patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted interaction model pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * autoimmune_disease + clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab by autoimmune disease interaction: effect=0.027 months, p=0.422.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After accounting for `kras_g12c` and `stk11_mutation`, the positive `treatment_sotorasib` association with `pfs_months` is larger in squamous `histology` than in adenocarcinoma `histology`.

analyses.code: OLS adjusted model including treatment_sotorasib, kras_g12c, stk11_mutation, sotorasib-by-KRAS, sotorasib-by-STK11, KRAS-by-STK11, three-way interaction, squamous-by-sotorasib, and clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Sotorasib by squamous histology interaction: effect=0.001 months, p=0.926.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a combined multivariable interaction model, `treatment_sotorasib` by `kras_g12c` remains the dominant positive treatment-biomarker interaction, while pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 interactions remain near zero.

analyses.code: Combined OLS model with clinical covariates plus sotorasib-KRAS-STK11, pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 terms.
analyses.result_summary: Final model sotorasib by KRAS G12C interaction: effect=2.557 months, p=<1e-250.

analyses.code: Combined OLS model with clinical covariates plus sotorasib-KRAS-STK11, pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 terms.
analyses.result_summary: Final model sotorasib by KRAS G12C by STK11 interaction: effect=-0.172 months, p=5.127e-4.

analyses.code: Combined OLS model with clinical covariates plus sotorasib-KRAS-STK11, pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 terms.
analyses.result_summary: Final model pembrolizumab by PD-L1 interaction: effect=-2.585e-4 months, p=0.919.

analyses.code: Combined OLS model with clinical covariates plus sotorasib-KRAS-STK11, pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 terms.
analyses.result_summary: Final model pembrolizumab by TMB-high interaction: effect=-0.001 months, p=0.924.

analyses.code: Combined OLS model with clinical covariates plus sotorasib-KRAS-STK11, pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 terms.
analyses.result_summary: Final model osimertinib by EGFR mutation interaction: effect=-0.022 months, p=0.209.

analyses.code: Combined OLS model with clinical covariates plus sotorasib-KRAS-STK11, pembrolizumab-PD-L1, pembrolizumab-TMB, osimertinib-EGFR, and olaparib-BRCA2 terms.
analyses.result_summary: Final model olaparib by BRCA2 mutation interaction: effect=-0.035 months, p=0.323.
